# svix_autoconfig (Resource)

Configures a webhook endpoint via [Webhooks AutoConfig](https://docs.svix.com/receiving/webhooks-autoconfig). Does not require provider `token` or `server_url`; credentials come from the AutoConfig token. Create and update call `subscribe()`. Destroy only removes the resource from Terraform state (the portal-created endpoint is left unchanged).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Provider credentials are not required for AutoConfig.
provider "svix" {}

resource "svix_autoconfig" "example" {
  token = "auto_v1_..."
  url   = "https://api.us.example.com/webhooks/acme"
  filter_types = [
    "invoice.paid",
    "user.created",
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `token` (String, Sensitive) AutoConfig token from the Application Portal (prefix `auto_v1_`).
- `url` (String)

### Optional

- `channels` (List of String)
- `description` (String)
- `disabled` (Boolean)
- `filter_types` (List of String)
- `headers` (String) JSON object of HTTP headers encoded as a string, use `jsonencode` to create this field
- `metadata` (String) JSON object encoded as a string, use `jsonencode` to create this field
- `rate_limit` (Number) Deprecated; prefer `throttle_rate`.
- `throttle_rate` (Number)
- `uid` (String)
- `version` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `secret` (String, Sensitive) The endpoint's verification secret from the AutoConfig token. Format: base64 encoded random bytes prefixed with whsec_.
- `updated_at` (String)
